nasb.text: Moreover, the archers shot at your servants from the wall; so some of the king’s servants are dead, and your servant Uriah the Hittite is also dead.”

esv.text: Then the archers shot at your servants from the wall. Some of the king’s servants are dead, and your servant Uriah the Hittite is dead also.”

cnv.text: 那時射手從城牆上射王的僕人；王的僕人中有些陣亡了，你的僕人赫人烏利亞也死了。”

ccb.text: 敌军的弓箭手从城墙上射死了王的几个士兵，赫人乌利亚也死了。”
